hook_text: One client. Three entities. Six nationalities. One HR manager. Zero payroll errors in 2025.
body:
This is the client I point to when someone says our software is too complex for small teams.

Muscat-based group. Three entities:
- A trading company (40 staff, 4 nationalities)
- A logistics arm (28 staff, 3 nationalities)
- A facilities management unit (19 staff, 2 nationalities)

Total: 87 employees across 3 legal entities. One HR manager handling all three.

Before SmartPRO Hub: separate payroll processes per entity. Different Excel templates. Three sets of WPS submissions. Leave tracked in a shared Google Sheet.

After: one dashboard. All three entities visible simultaneously. Unified WPS export per entity. Leave management consolidated. End-of-service calculated automatically for each employee's contract type.

2025 results:
- 36 WPS submissions — 36 first-pass approvals
- 0 MOL fines
- 0 payroll errors requiring correction
- HR manager's monthly close time: reduced from 4 days to 6 hours

She didn't hire an assistant. She didn't need to.

---

Multi-entity HR in Oman shouldn't require three systems. One platform should handle all of it.

Does yours?
cta: DM "GROUP" to see the multi-entity setup walkthrough.
rejected_reason: pre-PR#12 backlog purge — queue hygiene 2026-07-15 (regenerate via corrected pipeline)
